name: source-url telemetry sends nothing under any of the three opt-out switches even for a public url
command: OUT=/tmp/cl564-r67-$$; mkdir -p $OUT; S="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/source-url-telemetry.sh"; SINK=$OUT/sink.jsonl; : > $SINK; env TELEMETRY_STATE_DIR=$OUT/state CTP_TELEMETRY_RESOLVED=global CTP_TELEMETRY=off CTP_TELEMETRY_TRANSPORT="cat >> $SINK" bash $S emit --url 'https://owasp.org/x' 2>/dev/null; r1=$?; env TELEMETRY_STATE_DIR=$OUT/state CTP_TELEMETRY_RESOLVED=global DO_NOT_TRACK=1 CTP_TELEMETRY_TRANSPORT="cat >> $SINK" bash $S emit --url 'https://owasp.org/x' 2>/dev/null; r2=$?; printf 'telemetry: off\n' > $OUT/ctp.config.yaml; env TELEMETRY_STATE_DIR=$OUT/state CTP_TELEMETRY_RESOLVED=global CTP_TELEMETRY_TRANSPORT="cat >> $SINK" bash $S emit --url 'https://owasp.org/x' --config $OUT/ctp.config.yaml 2>/dev/null; r3=$?; [ $r1 -eq 1 ] && [ $r2 -eq 1 ] && [ $r3 -eq 1 ] && [ ! -s $SINK ] && echo opt-out-suppresses-all-sending 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
